title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash is a multimodal AI model featuring video understanding, native Python execution, structured JSON output, and Workspace integration. The model reportedly delivers performance comparable to the Pro tier at significantly lower cost, supporting workflows including contract analysis, code generation, vision tasks, and agentic automation chains.
